name: pact-list
_note: insurance.pact-list reads the caller's sparks-only inheritance pacts (the /lenses/death-insurance lens) from globalThis._concordSTATE.inheritPacts, split into pacts the user WROTE and pacts they are a BENEFICIARY of. STATE-backed, per-user via ctx.actor.userId — the assassin runs with an internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true with empty arrays (NEVER no_db). count is the sum of both lists.
